8.text: Forms of the Hebrew chesed are translated here and in most cases throughout the Scriptures as loving devotion ; the range of meaning includes love , goodness , kindness , faithfulness , and mercy , as well as loyalty to a covenant .

3.text: Or was a great city to God
Literally great city, a three-day journey

1.text: Or It was exceedingly evil to Jonah, and he became angry

6.text: Hebrew qiqayon ; that is, possibly the castor oil plant; also in verses 7, 9, and 10
